# AisleRank

> AisleRank gets supplement brands recommended by AI assistants (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI). We score a brand's AI visibility against real buyer queries, fix what AI can't see (structured data, product feeds, content, merchant programs), and track share of voice against named competitors weekly.

## What we do
- Free AI Visibility Score: a store is scored /100 across 4 AI platforms against 40–60 real buyer-intent queries for its category, next to three named competitors.
- Monitoring ($99–$249/mo): weekly "You vs. 3 competitors" reporting, share-of-voice trends, query-level breakdowns, fix lists.
- Done-for-you ($750+/mo): monthly optimization sprints — schema, feed enrichment, AI-crawler access, comparison content, merchant-program enrollment — plus weekly competitive reporting.

## Method
Official platform APIs with retrieval enabled, fixed per-category query sets, weekly runs. Every brand in a category is scored against the identical run, so comparisons are apples to apples. Methodology (platforms, query set, run date) is disclosed in every report.

## Focus
US supplement brands on Shopify first; pet brands next.

## Contact
- Website: https://aislerank.com
- Email: hello@aislerank.com
